seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Jakarta, Indonesia

places.name: Batavia Castle

places.name: Merdeka Square

places.description: Known as the Elephant Building, this museum holds one of the finest collections of Indonesian archaeology and ethnography.

places.description: Glodok is Jakarta's bustling Chinatown of temples, markets, and street food alleys northwest of Kota Tua.
